backend/main.mo: Main actor defining diagram state types (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels, images) with CRUD operations for diagrams and user profiles, integrating authorization and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old diagram state (without images) to new diagram state (with images field) by adding empty images arrays to existing diagrams.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: image upload/display capability and multiple servers icon addition, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries of frontend files covering report management pages, attack path visualization components, MITRE technique selector, PDF generation, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for a security-focused design aesthetic.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Threat Hunting Portal application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/index.ts: Example snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage for exporting canvas elements to PNG images.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with Internet Identity authentication, router setup for report and attack path pages, profile setup modal, and theme provider integration.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component handling icon placement, image upload/display with resize/move/delete, connections, drawing tools, text labels, transform tool, and element selection with ExternalBlob streaming for images.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: Renders an SVG connector line with an arrowhead between two points on an attack path diagram, supporting rotation, selection state, and click interactions. Calculates geometry for shortened lines, arrow positioning, and includes an invisible wider hitbox for easier clicking.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Displays draggable icons for attack path diagrams by mapping icon types to image assets. Supports drag-and-drop functionality and falls back to a text placeholder if an icon is missing.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a toolbar for attack path diagram editing with icon palette, drawing tools (pencil, line, arrow, text, eraser), text formatting controls, and diagram management actions (save, load, clear, undo). Includes image upload functionality with progress tracking and file validation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation, hero banner on homepage, and footer. Displays user profile, navigation links to Reports and Attack Path pages, and integrates LoginButton.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Modal dialog for loading saved attack path diagrams with a scrollable list showing diagram metadata (icons, connections, text labels, last modified date). Includes delete functionality with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when user is authenticated using Internet Identity. Clears authentication state and query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen with branding and Internet Identity authentication. Displays security messaging and a login button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: A React component that provides a searchable dropdown for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from a predefined list, with support for adding custom techniques via text input and displaying selected techniques as removable badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: A button component that triggers PDF generation for a detailed report, showing a loading spinner during generation and displaying toast notifications for success or error states.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name for profile setup, preventing dismissal until the profile is created and using a mutation hook to save the profile data.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component that prompts users to enter a name when saving an attack path diagram, with validation to ensure a name is provided before saving.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Defines the MitreTechnique interface and exports a static array of MITRE ATT&CK techniques covering Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation tactics with IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: A custom hook managing state for an attack path diagram editor, including placed icons, connections, drawings, text labels, uploaded images, drawing tools, undo history, and element selection with methods for adding, moving, resizing, and removing elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook that deletes a diagram by ID via the actor and invalidates the 'allDiagrams' query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all diagrams from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is available and not fetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend actor, with custom loading state that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a specific diagram by ID from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity delegation, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains React Query hooks for report operations (get all, get by ID, save, delete) that are currently disabled/stubbed since the backend no longer supports report functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile via the actor and invalidates the 'currentUserProfile' query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a diagram with name and state via the actor, invalidating both 'diagramState' and 'allDiagrams' query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors, including primary, secondary, destructive, and chart color schemes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Main page component for the attack path diagram editor, managing canvas state (icons, connections, drawings, text, images), toolbar interactions, and save/load/clear operations with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component for creating threat hunt reports with a form that submits report data via the useSaveReport mutation hook and navigates back on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Page component that displays a detailed view of a threat hunt report by ID, including executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations with PDF download capability.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React component that displays a table of all threat hunting reports with metadata, MITRE techniques count, IOCs count, and actions (view, download PDF, delete). Includes loading states, error handling, and empty state with a create button.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2canvas type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jspdf type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility function that generates a printable HTML document for threat hunting reports, opening it in a new window with styled sections for metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and findings. Uses browser print functionality rather than client-side PDF libraries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support. Includes functions to clear parameters from URL hash and session storage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with container settings, custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite configuration for React app with path aliases, environment variable injection for canister IDs, proxy setup for local API calls to port 4943, and build optimizations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a Threat Hunting Portal showing existing features for image loading and multiple server icons in attack path visualizer, plus pending feature requests for backend diagram state updates.
